entry.title: New IDC W56HZV22D0002 awarded to AM GENERAL LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PRODUCTION CONTRACT FOR CONTACT MAINTENANCE TRUCKS AKA HMMWV SECM. 5 YEAR FIRM FIXED PRICE/COST ONLY REQUIREMENTS CONTRACT FOR THE PROCUREMENT OF EST. 1,375EA.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
